back_translation: The LORD spoke to Moses and to Aaron, saying:
"Take a census of the sons of Kohath from among the sons of Levi, according to their clans, according to their ancestral houses,
from thirty years old and upward up to fifty years old, everyone who comes to the service-unit to do work in the Tent of Meeting.
This is the service of the sons of Kohath in the Tent of Meeting: the most holy things.
And Aaron and his sons shall enter when the camp sets out, and they shall take down the veil-curtain and cover the ark of the Testimony with it.
And they shall place over it a covering of tahash leather and spread a solid blue cloth on top, and insert its poles.

And over the table of the Presence they shall spread a blue cloth, and place on it the plates and the cups and the bowls and the pitchers for the drink offering; and the regular bread shall be upon it.
And they shall spread over them a scarlet cloth, and cover it with a covering of tahash leather, and insert its poles.
And they shall take a blue cloth and cover the lampstand of the light and its lamps and its wick-trimmers and its trays and all the vessels of its oil with which they serve it.
And they shall wrap it and all its vessels in a covering of tahash leather and place it on the carrying frame.
And over the gold altar they shall spread a blue cloth and cover it with a covering of tahash leather, and insert its poles.
And they shall take all the vessels of service with which they serve in the sanctuary, place them in a blue cloth, cover them with a covering of tahash leather, and place them on the carrying frame.
And they shall remove the ashes from the altar and spread over it a purple cloth.

And they shall place on it all its vessels with which they serve there: the firepans, the meat-forks, the shovels, and the sprinkling bowls — all the vessels of the altar. And they shall spread over it a covering of tahash leather and insert its poles.

When Aaron and his sons have finished covering the holy and all the vessels of the holy at the setting-out of the camp, after that the sons of Kohath shall come to carry; but they shall not touch the holy, lest they die. These are the burdens of the sons of Kohath in the Tent of Meeting.

And the oversight of Eleazar son of Aaron the priest: the oil for the light, and the fragrant incense, and the regular grain offering, and the anointing oil — the oversight of the whole tabernacle and everything that is in it, in the sanctuary and in its vessels."
And the LORD spoke to Moses and to Aaron, saying:
"Do not let the tribe of the Kohathite clans be cut off from among the Levites.
And do this for them, and they shall live and not die when they come near to the most holy: Aaron and his sons shall enter and assign them, each man, to his service and to his burden.
And they shall not come in to see the holy, even for a moment, lest they die."
And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying:
"Take a census of the sons of Gershon also, according to their ancestral houses, according to their clans,
from thirty years old and upward up to fifty years old you shall count them, everyone who comes to enter the service-unit to do service in the Tent of Meeting.
This is the service of the Gershonite clans: to serve and to carry.

And they shall carry the curtains of the tabernacle and the Tent of Meeting, its covering and the covering of tahash that is over it from above, and the curtain of the entrance of the Tent of Meeting,

and the curtains of the courtyard and the curtain of the entrance of the gate of the courtyard, which is around the tabernacle and around the altar, and their cords, and all the equipment of their service; and all that needs to be done with them, they shall do.
By the word of Aaron and his sons shall be all the service of the sons of the Gershonite, for all their burdens and for all their service; and you shall assign to them in duty all their burdens.
This is the service of the clans of the sons of the Gershonite in the Tent of Meeting; and their duty shall be under the hand of Ithamar son of Aaron the priest.
The sons of Merari, you shall count them by their clans, by their ancestral houses.
From thirty years old and upward up to fifty years old you shall count them, everyone who comes to the service-unit to do the service of the Tent of Meeting.
And this is the duty of their burden, for all their service in the Tent of Meeting: the frames of the tabernacle and its crossbars and its posts and its bases,

and the posts of the courtyard around, and their bases, and their tent pegs, and their cords, for all their equipment and for all their service. And by names you shall assign the vessels of the duty of their burden.
This is the service of the clans of the sons of Merari, for all their service in the Tent of Meeting, under the hand of Ithamar son of Aaron the priest."
And Moses and Aaron and the leaders of the congregation counted the sons of the Kohathite by their clans and by their ancestral houses,
from thirty years old and upward up to fifty years old, everyone who came to the service-unit for service in the Tent of Meeting.
And those counted of them by their clans were 2,750.
These are those counted of the clans of the Kohathite, everyone who served in the Tent of Meeting, whom Moses and Aaron numbered according to the word of the LORD through Moses.
And those counted of the sons of Gershon by their clans and by their ancestral houses,
from thirty years old and upward up to fifty years old, everyone who came to the service-unit for service in the Tent of Meeting.
And those counted of them by their clans, by their ancestral houses, were 2,630.
These are those counted of the clans of the sons of Gershon, everyone who served in the Tent of Meeting, whom Moses and Aaron numbered according to the word of the LORD.
And those counted of the clans of the sons of Merari by their clans, by their ancestral houses,
from thirty years old and upward up to fifty years old, everyone who came to the service-unit for service in the Tent of Meeting.
And those counted of them by their clans were 3,200.
These are those counted of the clans of the sons of Merari, whom Moses and Aaron numbered according to the word of the LORD through Moses.
All those counted whom Moses and Aaron and the leaders of Israel counted, namely the Levites, by their clans and by their ancestral houses,
from thirty years old and upward up to fifty years old, everyone who came to do the work of service and the work of burden in the Tent of Meeting.
And those counted of them were 8,580.
According to the word of the LORD he numbered them through Moses, each man, one by one, to his service and to his burden; and those counted of him as the LORD had commanded Moses.
